content.title: Sorter
content.short_description: Organizes media files into numbered folders.
content.description: This is a Python utility that automatically organizes media files into numbered folders containing a specified number of files each. The tool scans a source directory for video files (.mp4 and .mkv formats), sorts them alphabetically, and distributes them into sequentially numbered folders to help users better organize large media collections.
content.role: I developed a command-line file organization tool that takes user input for source directory and desired files per folder, then automatically creates numbered folders and moves files accordingly. I also created a basic GUI interface using tkinter to provide a more user-friendly alternative to the command-line version.

achievements: Provides automated file organization for large media collections
Reduces manual effort in sorting and categorizing video files
Offers both CLI and GUI interfaces for different user preferences
Implements alphabetical file sorting for consistent organization

screenshots: Main CLI interface showing file organization process
GUI interface screenshot with input fields and button
